x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Live agent escalation configuration ensures Now Assist VA can hand off to human agents when AI cannot resolve. Without escalation paths, users are stranded in failed VA conversations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure agent escalation queues and routing via sys_cs_queue. Test escalation paths from each VA channel. Now Assist VA must have human escalation paths for conversations AI cannot resolve.
